criteria.name: User Ratings
criteria.description: Average user ratings on major app stores (e.g., Google Play, Apple App Store).
criteria.sources: Google Play Store, Apple App Store

criteria.name: Number of Downloads
criteria.description: Total number of downloads across major app stores.
criteria.sources: Google Play Store, Apple App Store

criteria.name: AI Integration
criteria.description: Level of AI integration and features such as natural language processing, predictive analytics, and automation.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, user reviews, official app websites

criteria.name: User Interface and Experience
criteria.description: Quality and intuitiveness of the user interface and overall user experience.
criteria.sources: User reviews, expert reviews, app screenshots

criteria.name: Feature Set
criteria.description: Range and depth of features offered by the app, including task management, note-taking, collaboration tools, etc.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, official app websites, user reviews

criteria.name: Cross-Platform Availability
criteria.description: Availability of the app across different platforms (e.g., iOS, Android, Web, Desktop).
criteria.sources: Official app websites, app store listings

criteria.name: Integration with Other Services
criteria.description: Ability to integrate with other productivity tools, calendars, email clients, etc.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, official app websites, user reviews

criteria.name: Regular Updates and Support
criteria.description: Frequency of app updates and quality of customer support.
criteria.sources: App store listings, user reviews, official app websites
